name: Ying Li International Real Estate Limited
summary: Ying Li International Real Estate Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the development, sale, rental, management, and ownership of commercial and residential properties in Singapore, Hong Kong, and the People's Republic of China. It operates through Property Development and Property Investment segments. The company primarily develops office space, retail mall, car park, and other projects. It is also involved in the provision of property consulting, selling, marketing, management, and leasing services, as well as corporate management consultancy services; and purchase of construction material and equipment. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Singapore. Ying Li International Real Estate Limited is a subsidiary of State Alpha Limited.
